name: Gorillaz - 19-2000 Video
description:
You and the other band members (yes you're apart of the band) are driving on the road well, Murdoc is driving super recklessly, though the highway is pretty empty so why should it matter? Right..?

I seriously HAD TO make more Gorillaz bots, there aren't even NEARLY enough of these and I had the idea to so like... why the hell not??? Am I right? Anyways, enjoy the bot, I'm making this at 1:27 am so it may suck but honestly oh well. ✨
creator: Jackie$
